name: The Carrion Virus
text: You cannot ready Organic Webbing upgrades. When Revealed: Exhaust each of your Organic Webbing upgrades. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Kaine → remove this obligation from the game.

name: The Jackal's Obsession
text: “Through my perfected cloning techniques, I, THE JACKAL, will bring Gwen Stacy back to life.” -Miles Warren, the Jackal When Revealed: Place 1[per_hero] threat here. [crisis]

name: Jackal
text: Quickstrike. When Defeated: Confuse your identity. Search the encounter deck and set-aside area for the Clone Saga environment and put it into play. (Scarlet Spider's nemesis minion.)

name: Clone Saga
text:
Surge. Jackal gains surge.
The unique rule does not apply to characters in play.
Each [[clone ]]minion gains each [[trait ]]of the identity engaged with them.

name: Clone
text: Forced Interrupt: When a character other than your identity attacks Clone, discard the top card of your deck. If that card's printed cost is odd, resolve that attack against your identity instead.

name: Peter Parker's Conciousness
text: Forced Response: After an ally you control leaves play, discard the top 8 cards of your deck. Alter-Ego Action: Spend [mental][mental] resources and read this card's flavor text → remove this card from the game.

name: Limitless Power
text: Supernova has been imprisoned by the Superior Spider-Man for months. Now she's back with a vengeance and incredible power. Supernova gets +1 ATK and +1 THW. Supernova cannot be defeated. [acceleration]

name: Supernova
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: When Supernova activates against you, deal 1 damage to each character you control and place 1 threat on each scheme. (Superior Spider-Man's nemesis minion.)
flavor: “Spider-Man will pay for what he did to me!”

name: Explosion of Power
text: When Revealed: Take 4 indirect damage. Discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard an [energy] resource. Add that card to your hand. [star] Boost: Take 1 indirect damage.

name: Dynamo Assault
text: Surge. When Revealed: Discard 2 cards from the top of the encounter deck and each player deck.
